narrative:
Independence (precinct in Washington County) has 189 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.8 percentage points.
